noticias.titulo: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq edge higher after Trump orders Hormuz blockade against Iran
noticias.resumen: The major US gauges sank as tensions over the Strait of Hormuz revived worries about inflation and damage to the global economy.

noticias.titulo: Keep Calm and Carry On: This ETF Is Beating the S&P 500
noticias.resumen: The Invesco S&P 500 Low Volatility ETF and similar funds are outperforming the S&P 500 as investors seek safety amid market uncertainty.

noticias.titulo: Stock Market Today: Dow Inches Up, Home Sales Skid; Stock Clears Entry Amid Hormuz Blockade (Live Coverage)
noticias.resumen: Stock Market Today: The Dow Jones fell on President Trump's latest Iran move. Software stocks and biotech shined but Goldman Sachs fell.
